codeReview.summary: Core profile/account functionality exists, but several contract-critical behaviors are not implemented at the required routes/flows.

issues.description: VAL-USER-051 requires empty username redirect from /users/profile to home, but only /users/profile/:username is defined; /users/profile falls through to the global 404 route (App.tsx:177) instead of redirecting.
Feature contract specifies account modification at /users/account, but the implemented authenticated route is /account (and PublicLayout links non-admin users there), so the required URL is missing.

Feature contract specifies GET /api/users/:username, but the implemented API is GET /api/users/profile/:username (also consumed by client at PublicUserProfilePage.tsx:35), so the contracted endpoint is absent.

Feature is mapped to VAL-USER-052 (extra profile fields with date formatting), but profile API/UI only expose fixed fields (username/group/joined/last login) with no extra field retrieval/rendering path.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Traceability gap: feature is marked completed but has no worker session linkage, so no feature-specific handoff/transcript skeleton could be reviewed for procedure adherence.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: features.json:118-121 shows status=completed with workerSessionIds=[], currentWorkerSessionId=null, completedWorkerSessionId=null; no 'public-profile-account' matches in mission handoffs/ or worker-transcripts.jsonl.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Shared state documents contain conflicting route expectations for account/profile flows, increasing risk of implementation drift.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Mission feature description requires /users/account and /api/users/:username (features.json:88), implementation uses /account (App.tsx:101) and /api/users/profile/:username (routes/profiles.ts:17), while library guidance states account edit is /admin/account (./.factory/library/architecture.md:56).

summary: FAIL: public-profile-account does not satisfy required URL contracts and empty-username redirect behavior, and VAL-USER-052 coverage is missing.
